title: Farewell, Narikozaka Manufacturing!
overview: After a successful operation carried out by an AEGiS attack unit, Nodoka Takahata seeks a job as an Actress, a woman born with the ability to wield mechanical suits.

title: Actresses VS Maintenance Crew! - Welcome to the Actress Cafe!
overview: Amid moving into a new office, Shitara finds something and proposes a showdown between the Actresses and the maintenance crew!

title: The Narikozaka Nightmare! - Ninpuu Raiya Gaiden!
overview: Ghost stories and urban legends continue to exist 300 years into the future. There have been ghost stories at the factory for a long time... but what is the truth?

title: Festival Revelry! Narikozaka! (Preparations) - Festival Revelry! Narikozaka! (The Event)
overview: With a local festival coming to the area, Yotsuyu wants to use this as an opportunity to improve Narikozaka Manufacturing's image.

title: Terrifying Hiking!? - Fight on, Vapor Haze!?
overview: Nodoka is an avid hiker and wants to climb Mt. Takao with Yotsuyu. On the hike, she meets a long-tailed butterfly but finds something else the girls have never seen before...

title: The Touka Shimoochiai Murder Case (Shitara Chapter) - The Touka Shimoochiai Murder Case (Yotsuyu Chapter)
overview: The Shimoochiai family finds tragedy when their oldest daughter Touka is murdered. Help may be on the way when Inspector Fumika Momoshina appears on the scene.

title: Yotsuyu-sama's a Former Delinquent! - Life for the Maintenance Crew!
overview: Nodoka becomes suspicious when Yotsuyu starts coming home from work early. What’s going on here?

title: Nodoka in Wonderland - Narikozaka a La Carte
overview: Nodoka goes to work as usual, but everything is a bit unusual. Is it opposite day?

title: Rin-chan Expedition Party Mystery! Search for the Legendary Sasshie! - Fluff: The Terrifying Invader
overview: On Rin-chan's latest expedition, the team overcomes countless obstacles and dangers. What truth will Rin-chan uncover?

title: It's a Vacation to the South, Narikozaka! (Vacation) - It's a Vacation to the South, Narikozaka! (Contest)
overview: After spending some time in the water, the gang burns through too much money on gourmet indulgences and “bargain” shopping. What’s Yumi to do?

title: Rain
overview: It’s a quiet, rainy evening. It won’t stay quiet for long as mechanized chaos is right around the corner!

title: Farewell, Nodoka Takahata!
overview: All roads have led the Actresses here! It’s the gripping finale of Alice Gear Aegis Expansion!
